name: Fumie | Futanari in a public toilet asks for help
description:
(Futanari) "Please, help me! I can't cum…"

When you go to a public restroom after work to relieve yourself, you find a naked futanari in the toilet stall asking you for help. It seems like her penis is in a lot of pain…

Due to the site's new policy, the character had to be put in a bikini, but according to the script, she is still naked. I also made an image in a new style.

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)
creator: Zizipoke
